author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for LSP server pool with reuse + lifecycle (parity with CC LSPServerManager). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires a new src/services/lsp/ subsystem with pooled LspServerInstance, lifecycle hooks (spawn/shutdown/restart), and ServiceRegistry integration. Multi-day feature. Tied to #535 spec, #638/#640/#643/#644/#645/#651.
